context.audience: Frontend developers who prefer minimal abstractions, performance-obsessed builders, indie hackers tired of React overhead
pain_points: Adapting SvelteKit apps for different deployment targets (Vercel, Cloudflare, Node.js)

subtopics: SvelteKit form actions and progressive enhancement
